since_last: 54% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.93%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.99% · Gold +1.30% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 54% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.93%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.93%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +3.85%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +3.85%, MU +3.81%, AMAT +3.77%, MRVL +3.57%, LRCX +3.56%. Laggards: CRM -2.87%, SAP -1.54%, NOW -1.48%, EQIX -1.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.68% at $150.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
